Every active agent session shows up alongside your work. See a status pill for each session on the
				branch cards in the Home view and Graph sidebar, or see associated agents in the details panel when
				viewing working changes. See what needs attention. Hover for the full picture. Take action —
				resume, respond, switch — straight from the status. No more rotating through terminal tabs or chat
				panes to figure out which agent needs you.
每个活动的智能体会话都会显示在你的工作旁边。在主页视图和提交图侧栏的分支卡片上查看每个会话的状态标签，或在查看工作更改时在详情面板中查看关联的智能体。一眼看清需要关注的内容，悬停查看完整信息，并直接从状态执行操作 — 恢复、回复、切换。再也不用在终端标签页和聊天面板之间来回翻找哪个智能体需要你了。

The working changes view of the details panel is your workflow guide. Selecting on a working changes row
				surfaces the next action that keeps the loop moving: respond to an awaiting agent, push, open a PR,
				resolve a conflict, finish the rebase. Nothing in flight? The integrated Launchpad points you to the
				next PR or issue worth picking up.

详情面板的工作更改视图是你的工作流向导。选中一行工作更改
				即可显示推动流程继续的下一步操作：回应等待中的智能体、推送、打开 PR、
				解决冲突、完成变基。当前没有进行中的工作？集成的启动台会为你指出
				下一个值得着手的 PR 或议题。

Multi-WIP visibility: every worktree's working changes are visible at the same time, in the same Graph. Focused Graph mode: when you're heads-down on one branch, scope the Graph to just the commits that matter — the bigger picture is always one click away.
多 WIP 可见性：所有 Worktree 的工作更改同时显示在同一个提交图中。聚焦图模式：当你专注于某个分支时，可以将提交图限定到真正相关的提交 — 全局视角始终一键可达。

Select a commit or multi-select rows in the Graph and jump straight into Compare mode in the details
				panel. Branch vs. branch, commit vs. commit, working changes vs. anything — just select and
				compare. It's the fastest way to get eyes on the exact diff you care about.
在提交图中选择一个提交或多选多行，直接进入详情面板的比较模式。分支对分支、提交对提交、工作更改对任意引用 — 选中即比较。这是查看你关心的确切差异的最快方式。

Compose mode lives right in the details panel: select files, exclude noise, and let AI split a sprawling
				WIP into a series of focused commits — without ever opening a separate view. Your reviewers will
				thank you, and so will your future self.
编排模式就在详情面板中：选择文件、排除噪音，让 AI 把庞杂的 WIP 拆分为一系列聚焦的提交 — 无需打开单独的视图。你的评审者会感谢你，未来的你也会。
You also have access to the GitKraken DevEx platform, unleashing powerful Git visualization & productivity capabilities everywhere you work: IDE, desktop, browser, and terminal.
你还可以访问 GitKraken DevEx 平台，在 IDE、桌面端、浏览器和终端等任何工作位置释放强大的 Git 可视化与生产力能力。

The Commit Graph brings your development and agentic workflows together. Parallelize your work — manage multiple active worktrees, orchestrate concurrent agents, and execute your entire Git lifecycle without context-switching.
提交图将你的开发流程与智能体工作流融合在一起。并行推进工作 — 管理多个活动的 Worktree、编排并发智能体，并在不切换上下文的情况下完成整个 Git 生命周期。

Let AI handle the heavy lifting - from turning your changes into clear, logical commits to getting
				context on others' work. GitLens’s AI features make reviews efficient and keep your history clean.
让 AI 替你处理繁重工作 — 从将更改整理成清晰、有条理的提交，到了解他人工作的上下文。GitLens 的 AI 功能让评审更高效，并保持提交历史整洁。

Bring order from chaos. Restructure changes into
							clean, review-ready commits automatically. Catch issues early with severity-tagged reviews
							that you can delegate directly to an agent
化繁为简。自动将更改重组为干净、可评审的提交。通过带严重程度标记的评审尽早发现问题，并可直接委托给智能体处理

Review changes, stage files, create or compose commits, and
